prompt: Studia questa directory. Dimmi come potrei migliorare la flint CLI — cosa manca, cosa ha troppo?
content:
@flint v0 hybrid
G: improve_flint_cli
C: two_clis_conflated ∧ "flint-ir python vs flint bash wrapper" ∧ flint_ir_has("validate parse audit stats repair claude-code routing") ∧ missing_stdin_dash ∧ missing_in_place_fix ∧ missing_verify_subcommand ∧ missing_lint_subcommand ∧ missing_grammar_dump ∧ missing_shell_completion ∧ inconsistent_output_flags ∧ prog_name_hardcoded("flint-ir") ∧ mcp_server_not_exposed_as_subcommand ∧ audit_explain_overloaded_5_panels ∧ claude_code_namespace_too_narrow ∧ inventory_duplicates_stats ∧ repair_has_no_category_flag ∧ bash_wrapper_lacks_doctor_and_version
P: add_lint_subcommand_wrapping_parser_and_drift ∧ add_verify_subcommand_wrapping_assess_output ∧ add_grammar_subcommand_dumping_ebnf_and_clause_tags ∧ add_stdin_dash_on_all_path_args ∧ repair_gets_write_in_place_flag ∧ unify_output_as("--format json|text") ∧ expose_mcp_as("flint-ir serve") ∧ derive_progname_from_argv0_so_hewn_ir_shows_hewn_ir ∧ split_audit_explain_into_separate_panels_or_dedicated_subcommands ∧ rename_claude_code_to("compress") ∧ fold_inventory_into("stats --compare") ∧ propagate_category_flag_to_repair ∧ add_doctor_to_bash_wrapper_verifying_prompt_and_settings_resolution ∧ add_shell_completions_bash_zsh
V: help_lists_new_commands ∧ lint_exits_nonzero_on_parse_or_drift ∧ verify_reproduces_eval_common_assess_output ∧ grammar_dump_matches("FLINT_GRAMMAR.ebnf") ∧ repair_write_is_idempotent ∧ all_path_args_accept("-") ∧ progname_in_help_matches_invocation ∧ serve_starts_mcp_server ∧ compress_subcommand_alias_keeps_claude_code_working ∧ bench_vibe_3way_still_green ∧ existing_tests_still_pass
A: edit("src/flint/cli.py") ∧ edit("src/flint/normalize.py") ∧ edit("src/flint/mcp_server.py") ∧ edit("integrations/claude-code/bin/flint") ∧ add("src/flint/grammar_cmd.py") ∧ add("tests/test_cli_new_commands.py") ∧ update_readme_cli_section

input.command: /home/tommaso/dev/playground/SIGIL/src/flint/../../ && python -c "from flint.cli import main; main(['--help'])" 2>&1 | head -40
python3 -m flint audit --help 2>&1; echo ---; python3 -m flint claude-code --help 2>&1
